Title: Tenant Isolation Bypass via Header Injection
Description: Users can specify arbitrary x-tenant-id headers to access other tenants' data, bypassing JWT claims
Impact: Complete data isolation breach; users access competitors' invoices, configurations, and audit logs
Recommended Fix: Remove header override in tenantContext middleware. Use only JWT claims (req.auth?.tenantId). Validate tenantId exists and user belongs to tenant

Title: N8N Extraction Webhook No Authentication
Description: N8N webhooks are unauthenticated. Any attacker can trigger fake extraction results, marking invoices as extracted without actual OCR
Impact: Malicious extraction results injected; fake GL postings; invoice audit trail corrupted; financial records compromised
Recommended Fix: Implement HMAC signature validation on N8N webhook payloads. Add timestamp validation (prevent replay attacks). Separate webhook routes from authenticated API. Add rate limiting per tenant/invoice

Title: Missing TenantId Validation in Bulk Upload
Description: bulkUpload() accepts null/empty tenantId, bypassing access control checks downstream
Impact: Files uploaded without tenant binding; cross-tenant file leakage; users bypass auth
Recommended Fix: Add validation: if (!context?.tenantId) throw createError('Tenant context required', 400, 'VALIDATION_ERROR')

Title: File Path Traversal Vulnerability
Description: path.join() doesn't prevent ../ sequences in paths if incomingPath is compromised. Attacker can read/write arbitrary files on server
Impact: Read/write arbitrary files on server; complete filesystem compromise
Recommended Fix: Validate resolved path stays within root: const basePath = path.resolve(incomingPath); const fullPath = path.resolve(basePath, storedName); if (!fullPath.startsWith(basePath)) throw error

Title: N8N Fire-and-Forget Promise Rejection Silent Failure
Description: Extraction failures are silent-logged to console. If process exits/crashes, webhook delivery is lost forever. No retry queue
Impact: Invoices stuck in EXTRACTING state indefinitely; silent data loss; no alerting to operators; extraction failures undetected
Recommended Fix: Implement queue-based N8N delivery with retries. Store webhook delivery attempts in database. Async retry worker processes queue every 5min. Log all failures to persistent store

Title: Database Connection Leak on Transaction Rollback Failure
Description: Connection pool not explicitly managed in error paths. If client.query('ROLLBACK') fails, connection not released properly
Impact: Connection pool exhaustion after a few errors; subsequent requests hang; database becomes unreachable; application DoS
Recommended Fix: Implement proper try/finally/catch block: finally { try { client.release(); } catch (e) { client.end().catch(() => {}); } }

Title: Null Pointer on Invoice ID Extraction
Description: Missing null checks on context object. If context is malformed (missing tenantId), subsequent DB queries fail with unhandled TypeError
Impact: Unhandled exception crashes request handler; potential DoS vector; 500 errors on user requests
Recommended Fix: Add validation: const tenantId = requireTenantId(context?.tenantId); const branchId = requireBranchId(context?.branchId); Add requireTenantId() helper

Title: Deduplication Bypassed by Tenant Isolation Issue
Description: When combined with C-1 (tenant isolation bypass), deduplication is bypassed across tenants. Attacker uploads same PDF to multiple tenants
Impact: Secondary to C-1. Both tenants' records corrupted; duplicate invoices in system; financial data integrity violated; audit trail poisoned
Recommended Fix: This is a secondary effect of C-1. Fixing C-1 resolves this issue automatically. Ensure dedup hash check includes tenant_id in query

Title: Missing Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
Description: No validation that users have correct role to perform actions. Any authenticated user can call any endpoint (REVIEWER-only, POSTING_OPERATOR-only, etc.)
Impact: Reviewers can post invoices (bypassing approval); Posting operators can modify extracted data; Audit operators can approve/reject invoices; role isolation broken
Recommended Fix: Implement requireRole() helper in all service methods: requireRole(context, ['REVIEWER', 'SUPER_ADMIN']); Throw 403 if role insufficient

Title: Unvalidated N8N Webhook Payloads
Description: N8N sends extraction results (extracted fields, confidence scores) with no schema validation. Backend accepts any structure
Impact: Data quality degradation; Invalid field names cause DB errors; Null values corrupt data; XSS payloads injected; Analytics poisoned if rendered unsanitized
Recommended Fix: Add payload schema validation: const schema = z.object({ extractedFields: z.record(z.string()), confidence: z.number().min(0).max(1) }); const validated = schema.parse(req.body)

Title: localStorage XSS Vulnerability
Description: JWT token stored in localStorage without httpOnly flag. If XSS payload injected, attacker steals token via JavaScript and impersonates user
Impact: Account takeover; attacker gains access to all tenants user can access; session hijacking; data breach
Recommended Fix: Use httpOnly cookies instead (backend sets; JS cannot access); OR implement token-in-URL encryption; OR use separate session storage + refresh token pattern

Title: Missing Input Validation on Query Parameters
Description: Query parameters accepted without validation. Attacker can request limit=999999999 or sortBy with SQL injection patterns
Impact: Denial of service; database performance degradation; memory exhaustion; potential SQL injection if string interpolated
Recommended Fix: Validate all query params: const limit = Math.min(Number(query.limit)||20, 1000); Validate sortBy against whitelist; Escape search terms

Title: Missing Invoice Action Button Handlers
Description: Buttons (View, Review, Retry Extraction, Open Audit) have no onClick handlers. Users cannot interact with invoices
Impact: Feature broken; users cannot view details, retry extractions, or audit logs; app unusable for core workflows
Recommended Fix: Add onClick handlers to each button: View -> navigate to details; Review -> navigate to review queue; Retry -> call retryExtraction API; Audit -> navigate to audit-log filtered by invoice

Title: Uncontrolled Form Inputs in Filter Row
Description: Tenant and branch filters use defaultValue instead of value/onChange. Filter changes are ignored; state not updated
Impact: User cannot filter by tenant/branch; filter changes ignored; confusion and poor UX; feature broken
Recommended Fix: Convert to controlled inputs: [selectedTenant, setSelectedTenant] state; <select value={selectedTenant} onChange={(e) => setSelectedTenant(e.target.value)}>

Title: No Role-Based Access Control on Frontend Routes
Description: Protected routes check only if user logged in; no role validation. Users can navigate to /review-queue even if POSTING_OPERATOR
Impact: UI mismatch with backend; users attempt operations backend rejects; poor UX; unauthorized access to pages
Recommended Fix: Implement RoleBasedRoute component: if (!allowedRoles.includes(user.role)) return <Navigate to='/dashboard' />; Use for all protected pages

Title: Missing Token Refresh / Expiration Handling
Description: JWT token stored with no refresh logic. Token expiration not handled. After token expires, API calls silently fail; no re-auth prompt
Impact: Silent failures; user frustration; potential data loss if form submitted after token expiry; app becomes unusable after 8 hours
Recommended Fix: Implement token refresh endpoint and retry logic. Add 401 interceptor; refresh token and retry request. Show re-auth prompt on 401 after refresh fails

Title: Missing Invoice Status State Machine Validation
Description: Invalid transitions allowed: POSTED->EXTRACTING, REJECTED->APPROVED, PENDING_REVIEW->UPLOADED. No validation of status transitions
Impact: Data integrity violation; invoices in impossible states; audit trail corrupted; reporting broken; financial records inconsistent
Recommended Fix: Implement state machine validation: define validTransitions map; check current status allows new status before transition; throw 409 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION if invalid

Title: Missing Signature Validation on N8N Webhooks
Description: No HMAC signature validation to confirm webhook from actual N8N instance. Attacker can POST forged extraction results from any IP
Impact: Complete extraction bypass; fake data injected into financial records; audit trail forged; financial statements corrupted
Recommended Fix: Add HMAC signature validation in middleware: compute hmac signature of body; compare with x-n8n-signature header; reject if mismatch

Title: Hardcoded Mock Data in Production Service
Description: dashboard() returns hardcoded dashboardData instead of querying database. Production dashboards show test data, not real metrics
Impact: Misleading business metrics; management decisions based on wrong data; test data visible to end users; no indication of errors
Recommended Fix: Move hardcoded data to separate mock module. In production, query real database. Return empty/default if no data configured. Never return fake metrics

Title: Race Condition in Concurrent Invoice Updates
Description: No optimistic locking or version checks. Two concurrent requests can skip status machine states (e.g., UPLOADED->POSTED, skipping REVIEW)
Impact: Status machine violated; financial data loss; inconsistent audit trail; reports show wrong state; GL posting without review
Recommended Fix: Implement optimistic locking: add version column to invoices; UPDATE checks version; throw 409 if stale; client retries with new version

Title: Missing Rate Limiting on File Uploads
Description: No rate limiting on /invoices/bulk-upload. Attacker can upload unlimited files causing disk exhaustion and server crash
Impact: Denial of service; disk space exhausted; application crash; system unavailable; data loss during recovery
Recommended Fix: Add express-rate-limit middleware: 10 uploads per minute per tenant; Return 429 Too Many Requests when exceeded

Title: No Error Details Leakage Prevention
Description: Error messages returned to client contain sensitive system info (table names, file paths, database errors). Helps attackers craft targeted attacks
Impact: Information disclosure; attackers learn system architecture; helps craft targeted attacks; security intelligence leaked
Recommended Fix: Sanitize error messages: return generic 'Internal server error' for 5xx; generic message for unknown 4xx; keep details in server logs only

Title: Unvalidated DocumentType Enum
Description: documentType param accepted without validation against enum. Could be 'INVALID_TYPE', causing DB errors or silent data issues
Impact: Invalid data in DB; filtering/reporting broken; audit trail confusion; constraint violations
Recommended Fix: Add validation: const VALID_TYPES = new Set(['PURCHASE_INVOICE','SALES_INVOICE','AUTO']); if (!VALID_TYPES.has(documentType)) throw error

Title: Missing Pagination Bounds Check
Description: limit not capped: query with limit=10000000 causes memory exhaustion. offset not validated (could be negative). No max rows protection
Impact: Memory exhaustion; slow queries; DoS; database becomes unresponsive; application hang
Recommended Fix: Cap limit: Math.min(Math.max(Number(query.limit)||20, 1), 1000); Validate offset >= 0; Apply to all list queries

Title: Hardcoded Workflow Key in N8N and Global Fallback Risk
Description: N8N workflow used hardcoded x-workflow-key values and backend accepted/fell back to shared/global key patterns. This weakens tenant isolation and allows cross-tenant trust confusion if keys are reused
Impact: Cross-tenant security boundary erosion; difficult key rotation; potential unauthorized workflow-to-API calls when shared key leaks
Recommended Fix: Use tenant-specific workflow_key_token only. Remove hardcoded keys from workflow nodes and propagate incoming webhook key dynamically. Reject workflow-key auth when tenant key is missing or mismatched. Do not use global fallback key for tenant workflows

Title: Approval Did Not Dispatch Tenant Posting Webhook
Description: Invoice approval moved status to APPROVED but never triggered tenant-configured posting webhook. Result: n8n posting workflow never started even when postingWebhookPlaceholder was configured
Impact: Approved invoices stuck before posting automation; operators had to manually trigger workflow; inconsistent state between UI and orchestration
Recommended Fix: Dispatch posting webhook in approve path using tenant n8n config (n8nBaseUrl + postingWebhookPlaceholder + workflowKeyToken) with invoiceId/tenantId/branchId payload and workflow-key headers

Title: Extraction/Approval Flow Used Legacy Register Path and Missing Approval Runtime Context
Description: Workflow still referenced legacy register branch and placeholder paths, and approval flow did not fetch backend runtime-context before downstream steps
Impact: n8n could diverge from backend source-of-truth; tenant-aware runtime paths and lifecycle callbacks became brittle; troubleshooting was difficult
Recommended Fix: Start extraction/posting flows with runtime-context fetch, disable legacy register branch in active graph, add extraction started/retry/failed lifecycle callbacks, and keep posting lifecycle callbacks on canonical backend endpoints

Title: Posting Branch Used Wrong Activity Method and Missed Canonical Posting Result/Failed Callbacks
Description: Posting branch activity node used default GET (not POST), and workflow did not route real posting outcome to /invoices/:id/posting-result or /invoices/:id/posting-failed. Some nodes still targeted /posting-started.
Impact: Posting flow could terminate before Tally execution or leave invoices stuck in POSTING; UI and backend lifecycle drift; unreliable automation telemetry
Recommended Fix: Set activity callbacks to POST with workflow auth headers, switch posting step to /posting-executor, and route success/failure to canonical posting-result/posting-failed endpoints with parsed Tally summary metadata

Title: No API Documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger)
Description: Missing endpoint specs, request/response schemas. Developers unclear on payload format. Integration partners cannot self-serve API
Impact: No API contract; integration harder; team confusion on endpoints; increases support burden; API changes break clients unaware
Recommended Fix: Create OpenAPI 3.0 spec or Swagger documentation. Document all endpoints with request/response schemas, error codes, examples. Host on /api-docs

Title: Missing React Hook Dependencies
Description: useEffect and useMemo missing dependency arrays. Stale closures in callbacks. Example: loadInvoices not in useEffect dependencies
Impact: Stale state references; infinite loops possible; unexpected re-renders; memory leaks from old closures
Recommended Fix: Add dependency arrays to all hooks: useEffect(..., [deps]); useMemo(..., [deps]). Run ESLint plugin exhaustive-deps to catch all

Title: No TypeScript Implementation
Description: JavaScript-only codebase lacks type checking. Refactoring extremely risky. No compile-time validation of errors. High maintenance burden
Impact: High refactoring risk; silent type errors at runtime; developer safety reduced; IDE support limited; onboarding slower
Recommended Fix: Migrate to TypeScript gradually: add tsconfig.json; convert critical services first; use ts-loader/esbuild. Or add comprehensive JSDoc types

Title: Invoice Rules Field Never Persisted
Description: Rules field in UI form has no backend save endpoint. User can edit rules but changes are lost on page refresh. Database stores only defaults
Impact: User cannot configure business rules; Settings page appears broken; rules always default; customization lost
Recommended Fix: Add PUT /api/tenants/:tenantId/rules endpoint in backend. Save to tenant_rules table or tenant.rules column. Call from frontend on Save

Title: Branch Edit Form Not Properly Updating Existing Branches
Description: Edit mode replaces ALL branches via replaceBranches (delete+insert). Should support partial UPDATES to preserve metadata like creation timestamps
Impact: History and audit timestamps lost; existing branch metadata deleted; can't edit branch details without replacing all
Recommended Fix: Implement branch PATCH endpoint: UPDATE branches SET name=?, code=?, ... WHERE id=? AND tenant_id=?. Only update changed fields

Title: Tally Config Port Coercion Bug
Description: Number('') = 0 not null. Empty port string silently becomes 0, which is invalid. Should reject empty port values
Impact: Tally connection uses invalid port 0; connections fail silently; posting broken; GL integration offline
Recommended Fix: Use parseInt(value, 10); check for NaN/0; require minimum port 1024; validate port in range 1-65535

Title: No Graceful Shutdown on Process Signals
Description: server.js closes DB pool on SIGINT/SIGTERM but doesn't wait for in-flight requests to complete. Could lose N8N webhook confirmations
Impact: N8N webhooks may not be acknowledged; extraction status left in EXTRACTING; data inconsistency on restart
Recommended Fix: Implement graceful shutdown: set isShuttingDown=true; stop accepting new requests; wait for in-flight to complete (with timeout); then close pool

Title: Invoice Extraction Status Not Properly Modeled
Description: extraction_status_enum exists in DB but not used consistently in code. Some services check status strings; others use enum. Risk of typo bugs
Impact: Typo bugs possible (RETRYABLE vs RETRYEABLE); inconsistent status values; business logic divergence between services; bugs in missing enum checks
Recommended Fix: Create extraction status constants in utility module; import and use consistently everywhere. Add ESLint rule to reject string literals for status

Title: Missing Dependency Injection Pattern
Description: Hard imports of repositories in services. No DI container. Testing requires mocking filesystem and db modules. No test fixtures or test doubles possible
Impact: Unit testing very difficult; mocking cumbersome; integration tests required for everything; slow test suite; high test cost
Recommended Fix: Implement simple DI: pass dependencies as constructor params: new InvoiceService(repo, storage, n8n). Or use small DI container like awilix

Title: Concurrent POST /extraction-result Requests
Description: If same invoice receives 2 extraction results simultaneously, no transaction isolation. Both may succeed, creating duplicate extraction records
Impact: Duplicate extraction records; field values overwritten; audit trail confused; reporting shows wrong extraction result; data inconsistency
Recommended Fix: Use database advisory lock or FOR UPDATE row lock: BEGIN; SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id=? FOR UPDATE; UPDATE results; COMMIT

Title: File Storage Abstraction Incomplete
Description: storageService supports LOCAL and CLOUD modes. Only LOCAL (filesystem) implemented. S3/Azure/GCS modes accepted but ignored in code
Impact: Cloud storage never used; config misleads operators into thinking S3 works; no multi-region support; limited scalability; vendor lock-in to local FS
Recommended Fix: Implement cloud storage adapters: create S3Adapter, AzureAdapter, GCSAdapter classes; make storageService factory-based; use interface pattern

Title: Missing Invoice Approval/Rejection Details in Audit Log
Description: Audit log only records action (APPROVE/REJECT), not reason. Reviewer comments not stored. Cannot track why invoice was rejected
Impact: Cannot audit-trail rejection reasons; management cannot understand decision patterns; no feedback loop for corrections; disabled compliance audit
Recommended Fix: Add reviewer_comment and approval_reason fields to approvals table. Store comment text. Query for audit analysis. Enable decision tracking

Title: Missing Invoice Deletion Cascade
Description: Deleting a tenant doesn't cascade-delete invoices. Foreign key constraint will reject. Manual cleanup required or error thrown
Impact: Orphaned invoice records in DB; deletion fails; manual intervention needed; data cleanup complex; schema constraint prevents recovery
Recommended Fix: Add ON DELETE CASCADE to all child table foreign keys: ALTER TABLE invoices DROP CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_tenant; ADD CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_tenant FOREIGN KEY (...) REFERENCES tenants (...) ON DELETE CASCADE

Title: No Transaction Timeout Settings
Description: Long-running transactions can hold locks indefinitely. No timeout configured in PostgreSQL. Can starve other queries for resources
Impact: Long-running queries lock tables; other users blocked; application grinds to halt; deadlock scenarios; resource starvation
Recommended Fix: Set statement_timeout in PostgreSQL: ALTER ROLE app SET statement_timeout = '30s'; Implement query timeout in connection pool options

Title: Missing Pre-Save Connectivity Diagnostics for Storage/n8n/Tally
Description: Tenant onboarding previously allowed save without explicit end-to-end connectivity checks, so broken storage paths, n8n reachability, or Tally host issues were detected only at runtime.
Impact: Delayed failure detection; repeated upload/posting failures in production; poor root-cause visibility during onboarding
Recommended Fix: Add connectivity-test endpoint and onboarding UI step that validates storage write/read probe, n8n reachability, and Tally probe with definitive error codes/messages; block save when checks fail

Title: Sidebar Footer Logout Button Positioning
Description: Logout button adds extra footer border element. Better UX: add as last menu item position. Cosmetic but affects visual consistency
Impact: Cosmetic issue; minor UX imbalance; not a functional defect
Recommended Fix: Move logout button into main sidebar-nav as last item. Remove separate footer div. Style as menu item with divider above

Title: Mock Auth in Development Hardcoded
Description: mockAuth.js hardcodes test users. No easy way to test different roles. Should accept role parameter for testing all role paths
Impact: Developers can't easily test different role flows; must modify code to test REVIEWER vs POSTING_OPERATOR paths
Recommended Fix: Create mockAuth with role+email parameters. Or read from env var TEST_USER_ROLE. Allow role switching in dev UI

Title: Missing Loading States on Slow API Calls
Description: Dashboard metrics page shows no spinner while loading. User thinks page is frozen; no visual feedback
Impact: Confusion; looks broken; poor perceived performance; users think app crashed
Recommended Fix: Add skeleton loaders or spinner component. Show during API calls. Display estimated load time if > 2 seconds

Title: No Invoice Empty State Icon or Illustration
Description: 'No invoices found' text only. Could benefit from icon/illustration. Improves UX clarity and reduces perceived emptiness
Impact: Minor UX gap; looks less polished; empty states feel bare
Recommended Fix: Add SVG illustration or icon for empty state. Improves visual hierarchy and UX feel

Title: No Dark Mode Support
Description: CSS uses hardcoded light colors. No high-contrast mode. Accessibility gap for low-vision users. Modern apps expect dark mode
Impact: No dark mode option; accessibility gap; modern expectations not met; some users may avoid app
Recommended Fix: Add CSS custom property theme switch. Create dark color palette. Toggle via button or system preference detection
